name: Newbrook 62.5" Floor Lamp - FLL4131 - Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the newbrook 62.5 inch black iron floor lamp. Crafted with sleek black iron, this floor lamp exudes modern elegance and seamlessly complements any home decor. Its cotton shade provides a soft, inviting glow that enhances the ambiance of your living room, bedroom, or office. The newbrook floor lamp stands tall at 62.5 inches, offering the perfect blend of style and functionality. Whether you are reading, relaxing, or working, this lamp delivers the illumination you need with a touch of sophistication. Transform your space with this chic and versatile lighting solution that adds an attractive focal point to any room. Discover the perfect balance of form and function with the newbrook black iron floor lamp.
